<p>KARACHI: The lament of rising cost of living notwithstanding, the sale of appliances like refrigerators and deep freezers has picked up in the run-up to Eidul Azha.</p>

news.headline: Review of landmark nuclear treaty breaks up without consensus, raising arms race fears
news.summary: After four weeks of negotiations at UN Headquarters in New York, the 11th&nbsp;Review Conference&nbsp;of the nuclear Non-Proliferation Treaty (NPT) ended on Friday without consensus on a final declaration.

news.headline: From Kharkiv to the UK’s health service: Ukrainian doctor rebuilds her life – and helps others do the same
news.summary: On 23 February 2022, in her home city of Kharkiv, Dr Inna Soldatenko finished work, collected her daughter from school, cooked dinner and prepared a lecture for her students. The next morning, she awoke to explosions.
